scripts.dev:up: /bin/bash -lc 'cd /home/ev/chiirl-supa-hookup && setsid -f npx nodemon index.js </dev/null >/tmp/chiirl-supa-hookup.log 2>&1 && sleep 2 && pgrep -af "nodemon index.js|node index.js" | tee /tmp/chiirl-supa-hookup.pid'
scripts.dev:down: /bin/bash -lc 'if [ -f /tmp/chiirl-supa-hookup.pid ]; then awk "{print \$1}" /tmp/chiirl-supa-hookup.pid | xargs -r kill; rm -f /tmp/chiirl-supa-hookup.pid; else pkill -f "nodemon index.js|node index.js" || true; fi'
scripts.dev:status: /bin/bash -lc 'pgrep -af "nodemon index.js|node index.js" || true; echo "---"; tail -n 20 /tmp/chiirl-supa-hookup.log 2>/dev/null || true'
